meaning: n.搔,胳肢,发痒vt.胳肢,逗笑,使高兴,使发痒vi.觉得痒,使人痒
examples: She gave the child a little tickle.
The bigger girls used to chase me and tickle me.
This might tickle, but it feels divine.
Tickle added the extras but another Richards penalty cut the lead to 14-10 at the break.
But now, fantastic liberal arts colleges that tickle her fancy are squarely in her radar.
